modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to see course mapping in D2L.

full_description_text:
- So, the user was checking their D2L course info.  
- They mentioned they can't see the course mapped right.  
- They only see one section listed for the title, which seems off.
